div.head: The Chargé in Uruguay (Dominian) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 75. Minister of Foreign Affairs inquires whether, under article II of agreement relative to noninvoking of most-favored-nation clause, a contracting party may demand fulfillment of that clause from another of the contracting parties or whether article II implies that any contracting party may demand fulfillment of the clause only from a noncontracting party. I am making liberal use of press release of September 20 given on pages 213 and 214 of weekly issue number 260 of Press Releases but shall appreciate Department’s views on the above inquiry.
